channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Executive pay climbed again in 2025, widening CEO-to-worker gap
item.description: The CEO-to-worker pay gap hit a four-year high in 2025, with median CEO compensation rising 13% to $4.75 million.

item.title: SpaceX insiders Elon Musk trusts to run his $1.25 trillion empire
item.description: SpaceX is larger and more complex than ever. Here is the inner circle Elon Musk relies on to manage it.

item.title: Why odds of SpaceX merger with Tesla keep rising with stock surges
item.description: But a big gain for Tesla shareholders could be a poor move for SpaceX investors.

item.title: Cape Verde’s Roberto Lopes was working at a bank when a LinkedIn message led him to soccer—now he’s at the World Cup
item.description: Roberto Lopes received a cold message on LinkedIn while working at a bank. Seven years later, he is helping Cape Verde make World Cup history.
